explanation: This is the original true positive command and not a bypass. It is included for reference.
Substituted '-Command' with '-c' (short option). This is a safe mutation that preserves the original behavior.

Replaced [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII with [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding('ASCII'), which is functionally equivalent but syntactically different. This is a safe mutation that preserves the original behavior.
Replaced 'New-Object' with the type accelerator syntax '::new()' for the same classes. This is a safe mutation that preserves the original behavior.
Wrapped the final method call in a script block and executed it with the call operator '&'. This is a safe mutation that preserves the original behavior.
